question: Actions to take when capture is imminent include.
canonical_answer:
•Sanitize personal or sensitive materials
• Try to retain your personal cell phone
•Leave evidence of presence at capture point
•communicate your situation
(All are correct)

appears_in.title: Blood Chit Sere
appears_in.answer:
Communicate your situation
Leave evidence of presence at capture point
Sanitize personal or sensitive materials
Try to retain your personal cell phone

appears_in.title: Code Of Conduct Sere
appears_in.answer:
~Try to retain your personal cell phone

~Sanitize personal or sensitive materials

~Leave evidence of presence at capture point

appears_in.title: Jko Direct
